known_issues: PDF report compilation uses hardcoded mock values for evidence count and case valuation in dashboard invokes
No warning is displayed if the user attempts to import an invalid or corrupted .osb file
constraints: Must be 100% local-first and run offline.
Zero cloud storage or syncing allowed.
Master password andderived session key must never touch disk and must be zeroed out on memory drop.
All uploaded image evidence must be metadata-scrubbed before encryption.
